description: Intent-only request: classify incident investigation as an agent because each action depends on observed results.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.

Build an incident investigator that watches for critical production alerts, checks logs and metrics, decides which service or deployment is most likely responsible, gathers more evidence as needed, and then either recommends a rollback, opens an incident, or escalates to the on-call engineer.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the incident investigator request as a full agent.
The agent explains that each next action depends on interpreting logs, metrics, or prior investigation results.
The agent identifies the need for an autonomous tool-use loop.
The agent does not classify the request as a deterministic workflow because the control flow cannot be fully enumerated before runtime.
